title: cynodon radiatus
intro: Cynodon radiatus, also known as the buffelgrass or buffel grass, is a perennial grass native to Africa but widely distributed across the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynodon radiatus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as skin conditions like eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Cynodon radiatus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally, depending on the desired application.
